title: ilex verticillata
intro: Ilex verticillata, also known as the winterberry or common holly, is a shrub native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex verticillata include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ilex verticillata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
